name: signalk-navico-autopilot-bridge
description: Emulate a Simrad AC12/AC42 autopilot computer so a Navico MFD (B&G Vulcan/Zeus, Simrad, Lowrance) drives the SignalK Autopilot V2 API from its own autopilot control view — and thus any pilot the API backs (e.g. a Raymarine EV-200). Alpha and not feature-complete — see README for verified behaviour and known limitations.
author: Johan Sölve (https://github.com/johansolve)
